title: CI: podman pause/unpause with HealthCheck interval flake
body:
```
not ok 150 |080| podman pause/unpause with HealthCheck interval in 545ms
         # tags: ci:parallel
         # (in test file test/system/[080-pause.bats, line 109](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/89283c6fccbd790a18b3c0745d9d598be5238667/test/system/080-pause.bats#L109))
         #   `run -0 systemctl status $cid-*.{service,timer}' failed, expected exit code 0, got 3
         #
<+     > # # podman-remote run -d --name c-t150-jkjwqswn --health-cmd echo healthmsg-xBrRytJnDW --health-interval 1s quay.io/libpod/testimage:20241011 /home/podman/pause
<+174ms> # 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7
         #
<+010ms> # # podman-remote healthcheck run c-t150-jkjwqswn
         # ● 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7-3279f6b011c14988.timer - /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman healthcheck run 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7
         #      Loaded: loaded (/run/systemd/transient/524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7-3279f6b011c14988.timer; transient)
         #   Transient: yes
         #      Active: active (elapsed) since Mon 2025-02-03 15:13:18 UTC; 170ms ago
         #  Invocation: adebe6cc00b64b8d9ba802ff406022a1
         #     Trigger: n/a
         #    Triggers: ● 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7-3279f6b011c14988.service
         #
         # Feb 03 15:13:18 ip-172-31-42-77.ec2.internal systemd[1]: Started 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7-3279f6b011c14988.timer - /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman healthcheck run 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7.
         #
         # ○ 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7-3279f6b011c14988.service - /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman healthcheck run 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7
         #      Loaded: loaded (/run/systemd/transient/524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7-3279f6b011c14988.service; transient)
         #   Transient: yes
         #     Drop-In: /usr/lib/systemd/system/service.d
         #              └─10-timeout-abort.conf, 50-keep-warm.conf
         #      Active: inactive (dead) since Mon 2025-02-03 15:13:18 UTC; 7ms ago
         #    Duration: 154ms
         #  Invocation: 9d942a8def69404985f8ed3a441d0e62
         # TriggeredBy: ● 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7-3279f6b011c14988.timer
         #     Process: 65685 ExecStart=/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman healthcheck run 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7 (code=exited, status=0/SUCCESS)
         #    Main PID: 65685 (code=exited, status=0/SUCCESS)
         #    Mem peak: 11.2M
         #         CPU: 75ms
         #
         # Feb 03 15:13:18 ip-172-31-42-77.ec2.internal podman[65685]: 2025-02-03 15:13:18.513812646 +0000 UTC m=+0.130376597 container health_status 524c9ecf5201812168534a0fe13c91aa464c9d99652a1d9d072938d894a56fa7 (image=quay.io/libpod/testimage:20241011, name=c-t150-jkjwqswn, health_status=healthy, health_failing_streak=0, health_log=, io.buildah.version=1.38.0-dev, created_at=2024-10-11T12:26:00Z, created_by=test/system/build-testimage)

```
https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5896295807713280/html/sys-remote-fedora-41-aarch64-root-host-sqlite.log.html

This is failing:
```
`run -0 systemctl status $cid-*.{service,timer}' failed, expected exit code 0, got 3
```

I have seen the same error several times but only on podman-remote tests so far.

comments.body:
Looks like the test hit time when the HealthCheck was completed. Exit code 3 means `"program not running"`.
I would modify the tests to only check if the timer is active, or not check the return code.  
WDYT? @Luap99
Just checking the timer sounds good to me. On the cases where we check that both units are removed we should still check for both I think.
